wordplay_note: He is a barrier to truth — a paranoid manipulator and informant
card_description: James Barris (meaning "Barris = barrier / obstruction") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *A Scanner Darkly*. Arctor's housemate who manufactures weapons and secretly informs on him. Name note: He is a barrier to truth — a paranoid manipulator and informant. Paranoia as social poison — everyone is informing on everyone. First appears in *A Scanner Darkly*.

reference.brief: Arctor's housemate who manufactures weapons and secretly informs on him
reference.significance: Paranoia as social poison — everyone is informing on everyone
